title: Peaceful_fixed
description: Add recipes and changes several loot tables to accommodate peaceful mode, but still recommended if you find some parts annoying.
body:
### Peaceful is no longer so incomplete

Piglins now give blaze powder rather than ender pearls, you can still get pearls from the villagers.

You can mix bone meal, charcoal and blaze powder to make gunpowder.

Also adds blaze rods to nether fortresses chests.
